environment_prompt: A large modern vending machine dominating the frame, set against a dimly lit concrete wall in a public space. Behind the clear glass display window, multiple rows of food and drinks are neatly arranged: soda cans, bottled water, juice boxes, milk cartons, chips, and packaged snacks. Each item has a visible price label. The machine's interior is brightly lit with white LEDs, contrasting with the dim surroundings. To the right of the glass, a payment panel with a bill acceptor and coin slot. The machine shows slight wear from frequent use. At the bottom of the machine, a pickup compartment with a hinged flap door awaits dispensed items. A coin return slot sits below the payment panel. Inside the machine behind the glass, a spiral coil mechanism holds each product row, ready to rotate and drop a selected item into the dispensing chute.
perspective_prompt: First-person perspective, standing directly in front of the vending machine at eye height, facing the display window straight on. No character body visible.

interactions.action: Insert banknotes into the vending machine.
The vending machine dispensed the change in coins.
A bottle of Coca-Cola fell off the shelf.
Take the Coke from the pick-up slot.
